title: Selling the product
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Consumer — sales techniques, persuasion, and the psychology of the salesperson.
learningObjectives: Explain Cialdini's principles of persuasion in sales.
Evaluate ethical limits of sales persuasion.

simpleExplanation.title: The art of the sale
simpleExplanation.summary: Salespeople use reciprocity, scarcity, and commitment tricks to close deals — often leveraging social psychology compliance principles.
steps: Foot-in-the-door — small yes leads to big yes.

sections.content: **Selling the product** (2.4.2) — **Cialdini's six principles** are essential here.
